Hi! This is John Russel and in the next 7 minutes I`m going to basically spit in the face of all the thieves, crooks and liars who have been sucking cash out of your pocket and forcing you to pay unfair rates on power for you and your family…

Show you the real reason your electric bill is criminally high even though you`ve been doing everything you possibly can to conserve… and right in the middle of a recession when times couldn`t be tighter and you deserve a break…

And will teach you how you can slash your electric bill by 75% or more THIS MONTH…while keeping your home warm, cozy and comfortable… Leaving the thermostat EXACTLY where you want it without worrying or giving it a second thought…

Protecting your family and making your home 100% immune to power outages, brown outs, black outs, storms or domestic emergencies…

And without ever having to act like a “power Nazi” constantly yelling at your kids to shut the lights or turn off the TV again…

In fact, if you simply do what I say in this short video and put it into action (like over 102,412 hard working Americans have before you)…

You`ll Run Out To The Mailbox Like A Happy Puppy Every Time The Power “Bill” Comes…

Ready To Cash The Check The Electric Company Is Forced To Send You Each And Every Month…

Honestly, I can`t wait for you to experience what it`s like to slowly tear open that bill… And feel this goofy grin spread across your face because for the first time ever instead of paying through the nose, cutting corners and sacrificing just for you and your family to keep the lights on… Instead of paying the electric company one red cent… You  get a CHECK for $10, $50 or more… and get to use as much power as you want. 

Who The Heck Am I To Make Such A Huge Promise?

Like I said, my name is John Russel… I`m a 47 year old electrician… I live in Duluth, Minnesota with my beautiful wife and two gorgeous little girls… 

And over the last 4 years, I`ve helped over 102,412 hard working, regular Americans just like you to escape the “government electricity addiction”… and learn how to create your OWN POWER faster, cheaper and easier than thought possible… Even if you`re not very “handy” and haven’t touched a screwdriver since high school shop class. 

After using this method I`m going to reveal in this video, Gabriel French wrote me to say… 

“I have already reduced my electricity costs by hundreds of dollars and over the lifetime… I expect to save thousands.”

Or Adrienne Trent who says… 

“I actually had the thrill of standing there and watching the numbers on my power meter reverse and turn backwards!”

And those are just two of the HUNDRENDS of emails I get every week from people all over the country…who are shocked, amazed and even a little ANGRY when they discover the simple truth about electricity…

How you`ve been lied to again by the people with their thumb on the meter… and how EASY it is to create your own power in your very back yard just by following a few easy steps.

I`m going to reveal to you EXACTLY how to escape the “Government Power Trap” in just minute…

But before I do, I hope you won`t mind if I tell you why I care so DEEPLY about helping you “get off the grid” and protect your family the way the government and the power company won`t…

If you`re a parent (or if you even just have a heart) I`m sure you can imagine how horrible I felt… How ashamed I felt… When my beautiful little girl, Abby, came running up to me with her Teddy Bear in her arms and blanket wrapped around her… And with lips that were almost blue whimpered… 

“Daddy, I`m Cold”

This was 6 years ago, when Abby was just 3… If you`ve ever been to Minnesota you know that it gets cold in the winter. 20 below is normal and even on a good day just walking outside can feel like getting slapped in the face.

This one winter in 2004, the snow dumped on us, over 4 feet in just a night… And just like every winter, the power lines practically snapped like twigs.

I knew from experience it would be hours or days before the government could get the juice flowing again.

I fired up the generator and the wood stove (and tried not to think of the crushing cost of gas and the hundreds I was going to have to spend just to keep us warm for the night.)

And while it was “OK” for a while, around midnight the generator just choked and sputtered and died.

The whole house got dark and all we could hear was the wind whipping against the side of the house… And all we could feel was the cold.

Me and Molly and our girls cuddled for warmth by the stove… And all night I could feel little Abby under the blanket with me, shivering and shaking and whispering in my ear… “Daddy, make it warm again.”

And I felt Mad.

Mad at the government.

Mad at the snow.

But most of all…

Mad at myself… for putting my little girl in a position where she had to suffer like this.

I was her Dad. I was supposed to protect her. And I swore right then and there that… 

I Would Never Let My Little Girl Suffer Again

When the power finally came back on (it took almost 2 days this time) I got on the computer and tried to figure out what to do.

Relying on the electric company just wasn`t an option. 

I`d been watching my power bills move upwards like they were climbing the side Everest for years… 

I felt like I was giving blood every time I paid the bill and knew with shortening supplies of oil and nuclear disasters the price of electricity was going to go up, not down. 

Besides, even if the price of power went DOWN (which I knew wasn`t going to happen), I`d still be dependent on the power company to keep me and my family safe and warm. 

If they couldn`t keep the power on during a simple snow storm, what chance did we have if things actually got bad?

I thought about buying a bigger, newer generator… but with gas at over $3 a gallon that was as good as committing financial suicide. 

Nope. There was really only one option.

If I Wanted To Save Money And Protect My Family I`d Need 

To Use Everything I knew To Create My OWN Power 

And Get 100% Off The Grid

That way it wouldn’t MATTER if the power went out for everyone else…

It wouldn’t MATTER if the generator ran out of gas…

It wouldn’t MATTER if the cost of electricity doubled or triples for everyone else…

It wouldn’t MATTER if the whole WORLD was suffering black outs and brown outs, if we suddenly ran out of coal or oil or if something else terrible happened at a nuclear reactor… 

If I could create my OWN power, my little girls would ALWAYS be safe and warm and protected no matter what. 

If I could create my OWN power, my home would be a little island of light no matter how dark it got anywhere else.

As Soon As The Power Was Back Up I Got To Work Like A Man Possessed…

The first thing I did was start looking for solar panels… 

Like I said before, I`m an electrician by trade… Molly likes to say I`ve got “electricity in my veins” from all my years spent wiring up houses and commercial buildings. 

And I knew full well that lighting and heating a 4 bedroom house like mine with solar power shouldn`t just be “doable”… It should be downright easy.

All I`d need to do is set up some simple solar panels and batteries, and even in the dark Minnesota winters we`d have plenty of power to keep the lights and the heat on no matter what happened anywhere else.

There was only one problem.

When I went to the store and looked at the price of “Commercial” solar panels…

I Felt Like I`d Been MUGGED!

Honestly, it pissed me off.

Every store I went to… every retailer I found online was selling “Solar Kits” that, to a regular guy like me, seemed ABUSIVELY expensive.

I knew from all my work as an electrician that the COMPONENTS of a high quality, high EFFICIENCY solar panel (that could draw all the power you need even on a cloudy day) were downright cheap…

But all of the solar “kits” I found in stores and online were marked up like crazy by greedy corporations that were trying to rip me off…

And even the “most affordable” set up was THOUSANDS OF DOLLARS that Molly and I just didn`t have.

And as I kept searching online, I found all these messages from people just like you and me… Regular, hard-working folks who were sick of being dependent on the incompetent government for their electricity… 

Who wanted to get control of their electricity, stop contributing to our country`s dependence on foreign oil… and stop paying out the NOSE just to keep the air conditioning running in the summer or to watch the ball game on TV… 

And who were too smart to get ripped off by these ridiculously overpriced ”kits”…

So I Did What My Dad Taught Me To Do Years Ago…

I Put On My Thinking Cap And Decided To Solve The Problem

The very next weekend I went to the store and bought all the “stuff” I knew I`d need to create the kind of high efficiency solar panels I wanted for my home…

And even though the kits were priced at $600 or more… I managed to get EVERYTHING I needed for just $92.17.

Here`s a picture of me working in my garage that weekend. 

It only took about a day of “work” (though I actually had a pretty goodtime), but using a little bit of elbow grease and some pretty basic electric knowhow… I was able to put my whole “Home Power Plant” including solar panels, batteries and even a miniature wind turbine (a lot easier to build than you think)… 

For Just $197.15

(Including Tax!)

Less than 1/8th the cost the big companies were asking for panels and batteries that just weren’t as good. 

But that was just the beginning: 

A few weeks later I got my power bill. 

I was a little nervous about opening it up (after all, what if I`d messed up and spent all that time and money on something that didn`t work).

But I bet you can imagine the smile on my face when I tore open the bill and found out… 

The very first month I was able to slash my energy costs by a whopping 74%. And that was just the first month…

Actually, it wasn`t even a month. Since we were in the middle of a billing cycle it was only about 3 weeks that I actually had my new “Home Power Plant” up.

I knew I`d see even better results the 2nd month, but once I got my wind turbine set up and made some tweaks to the system I didn`t just “save money” on electricity.

For the first time in my life…

The Power Companies Actually Had To Pay ME For Power

Was I going to “get rich” from my new power plant?

Nope. But I gotta tell you, that check for$23.87 made me prouder than just about anything else I`d ever made.

I ended up using it to take my two little girls, Abby and Sarah, to the “Build-a-Bear” at the mall and letting them create the Teddy bear of their dreams. 

And sitting there watching my beautiful daughters play, I had this tickling in my brain that the simple methods I`d used to “outsmart” the power company and the big corporations that were trying to rip you off for solar and wind power could be used by a LOT of people. 

That night I started outlining my methods… all the simple steps I`d taken to create my home power plant and save me and my family THOUSANDS of dollars…

A few days later I had a rough document on my computer… I`d worked really hard to make sure it was easy to read and simple and not full of “Electro Jargon”…

But if I was going to let THE WORLD see what I was up to I needed some pretty definitive proof that ANYBODY could use my system to build their own Solar Panels and Wind Power…

… And Cut Their Power Bills Literally Overnight

So I called my Idiot brother Tom.

I love my little brother Tom, but he`s not exactly “handy”. He works behind a desk all day pushing numbers around and I don`t think he`s touched a screwdriver since high school shop class… But when I asked Tom if he wanted to cut his power bills he leapt at the chance.

And even though he`s never done any wiring in his life, he was able to put together his solar panels in just one weekend…

And saw a 40% drop in his power bill right away… had all the back-up power he needed the next time a storm hit and is paying next to NOTHING for electricity now.

And Tom Was Just The Beginning

From there I started sharing my Home Power Secrets with friends of mine around town… And again and again the results were the same.

Even folks who weren’t Technical or handy were able to grasp EXACTLY what to do to build their own Solar Panels and Wind Power (even though a lot of them thought it would be too complicated before they got started)…And to SLASH their electric bills to the bone.

Eventually my brother, my neighbors and (especially) my beautiful wife, Molly, ganged up on me and told me I HAD to share my system with the world… and that there were too many hard-working folks out there who could really benefit from what we were doing…

So after MONTHS of hard work writing the manuals, shooting video and testing everything to make sure ANYBODY could use it… 

The Power4Home System Was Born

Trusted By Over 26,000 Families In America, Canada And Around The World

The Power4Home System is a complete step-by-step program designed to give you everything you need to slash your monthly electric bill… by 50, 75, 125% (so the electric company actually pays YOU) or MORE…

And it`s been designed from the ground up to be EASY to use (if you passed 3rd grade and can use a screwdriver, you can build and install your own solar panels and wind power on your property).

When you grab the Power4Home System you`ll learn:

Secret Electricity Thieves… why your appliances are STEALING money out of your wallet every moment they`re OFF and how to stop power “leakage” without ever having to unplug a single thing.

The “Magic Box” device that instantly lowers your power bill by at least 10% (even if you NEVER use solar or wind power in your home).

I discovered this little beauty as an electrician, but the big power companies are going to court to have it BANNED.

The “Renewable Energy Myth”… what`s really going on with coal, oil and nuclear power and why big energy corporations have been lying to you for years.

But most of all you`ll learn how to create your very own “Home Power Plant” that slashes the amount you pay for electricity literally overnight…

Because I want you to make Power4Home System as simple and easy for you to use as possible, I`ve recorded EVERY step you need to follow in three simple, straight forward videos…

VIDEO 1: How To Build Your Own Super Efficient Solar Panels

In this professionally produced video, I`ll walk you through every step of creating your own “pro-grade” solar panels at a cost literally 1/10th what you`ll pay for pre-fab panels at the store.

In this video you`ll discover:

The shocking reason “off the shelf” solar panels are so expensive (hint: You`re being ripped off)… and how to build your own high-efficiency solar panels (that work even on cloudy days) for less than $100…

Even if you`re not technical and haven’t touched screwdriver since shop class in high school.

The “Dark Side” of solar power… what can go wrong with solar installation (not much, but if you don`t read this section you could be setting yourself up for a minor disaster).

Why “off the shelf” solar panels are so bulky… and how to get twice the wattage out of half the space by making a tiny tweak in the design and set up of your new solar array.

And Much More…

VIDEO 2: How To Build A High-Power Wind Generator

Remember, our goal here is FREE POWER.

And I don`t think even the government can figure out a way to charge you for the very air we breathe.

In you “How To Build A High-Power Wind Generator” you`ll get step-by-step, dead simple instructions on creating a compact wind turbine that will pump out up to 450 watts… even on “calm” days when you don’t think there`s wind at all. 

Personally, I think of Wind and Solar as the “tag team” of free power.

Use just one and you`ll SLASH your power bill in no time flat. 

Use both and you`ll be shocked as you quickly start storing EXCESS power… feeding the grid and actually get the power company to pay YOU.

VIDEO 3: The Power4Home Installation Guide – How To Install Your Very Own Solar And Wind Power Plant And Save Thousands

Think you have to hire an expensive “expert” to install your solar panels and wind turbine?

Think again.

The Power4Home installation guide video is essentially your “Home Power Bible”.

I`ve taken everything I know about generating power from wind and solar, translated it as much as possible into “Regular Guy” language… and created a step-by-step guide that covers every law, every possible screw-up” and every challenge you might face in creating your very own mini-power plant. 

In this installation guide video I`ll show you:

EXACTLY where to place your high-efficiency Power4Home panels so they suck up sunlight like a hoover sucks up dirt…

Think it`s obvious where to place your panels? You couldn`t be more wrong. Picking the wrong spot (even if it`s right in the sun) could cut your power production by half or more. 

How to “tune” your wind turbine to draw maximum power from the air… and a simple trick you can use to find the perfect spot for your turbine in seconds flat (Hire a “pro” and they`ll use a bunch of fancy equipment to figure out where to put your turbine… and will still end up putting it in the wrong place). 

And that`s just the videos themselves…

Because I want to make this as easy as possible for you, I`m also including…

3 Complete Power4Home Manuals

There`s nothing more annoying than having to constantly step back a DVD to check a detail or to see how I`m showing you to do something.

That`s why I`ve personally written companion manuals and workbooks to go along with each video. 

In the workbooks you`ll get step-by-step illustrated instructions so you can keep them handy while you`re working. Plus you`ll get worksheets to help mark down your dimensions and costs and make sure you`re doing everything the proven Power4Home way.

Here`s my promise to you:

Simply follow the Power4Home System and you`ll be shocked at how quickly you`re able to build and install your very own “Home power plant”… at how much power you`re able to generate right there on your property… and at the DRASTIC savings in your electric bill the first month.

“This was incredibly easy… I can hardly wait until they start paying me to use my electricity!”

“We are so glad we did not spend a whole lot of money on professionals to do it for us. In fact we are pretty sure that you saved us thousands of dollars.”

Bonus#1: Emergency Power – Your Survival Guide
